notable_phrases: Microsoft Cloud surpassed $50 billion in revenue for the first time
we have built an AI business that is larger than some of our biggest franchises that took decades to build
the majority of the capital that we're spending today and a lot of the GPUs that we're buying are already contracted for most of their useful life
summary: Microsoft reported strong cloud and AI growth with $50B+ cloud revenue but faced investor scrutiny over accelerating CapEx relative to Azure growth, with management defending capacity allocation across multiple high-value AI products beyond just Azure.
change_summary: No material changes detected vs 2026 Q1; scores broadly stable QoQ.
